title: nepeta nepetella var. incana
intro: Nepeta nepetella var. incana, also known as Catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) with fragrant, grayish leaves and purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Nepeta nepetella var. incana include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Nepeta nepetella var. incana include reducing stress, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Nepeta nepetella var. incana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health purposes.
